value.0: Is there anything else you need?
Good day <StartHighlight><FullName></Start>. Is there something you require?
Alright, here's your strongbox.  Tell me when you're finished.
You need to make room in your inventory first.
Alright.  How much would you like to withdraw? (<CUSTOM6000>gp In your account)
Alright.  How much would you like to deposit? (<CUSTOM6000>gp In your account)
Most certainly.  What is it you wish to know?

When I open your bank-vault I will give you a Strongbox.  You can put items into this Strongbox and they will be stored here for safe keeping.  This is useful for inventory management, and also frees up room for you to carry other items.  When you finish using your Strongbox bring it back to me.
When you "make a withdrawl" I will take the selected ammount of gold from your bank account and give it to you.  You may then use the gold for whatever you wish.

When you ask to "make a deposit" I will take the selected ammount of gold from you and store it for you untill a later date.  This is useful because if you die you will lose gold.  If your gold is here then there isn't anything to worry about.
Actually, yes.  You will have to go into the Bank Manager's office and speak with him about it.
Are you ready to close your vault?
Hello, Is there something I can do for you?
What is it you wish to know?

When I open your bank-vault I will give you a Strongbox.  You can put items into this Strongbox and they will be stored here for safe keeping.  This is useful for inventory management, and also frees up room for you to carry other items.  When you finish using your Strongbox bring it back to me.
When you "make a withdrawl" I will take the selected ammount of gold from your bank account and give it to you.  You may then use the gold for whatever you wish.

When you ask to "make a deposit" I will take the selected ammount of gold from you and store it for you untill a later date.  This is useful because if you die you will lose gold.  If your gold is here then there isn't anything to worry about.

For that you'll have to go into the back room and talk to the bank manager.  It costs a little bit of gold to get an account, and you also have to have atleast 1,000gp to make it worth our time to make you an account.
Alright, here are your family strongboxes.  Tell me when you're finished.
You need to make room in your inventory first.
How much would you like to deposit into the family gold account?  (<CUSTOM6001>gp in reserve)
How much would you like to withdraw from the family gold account?  (<CUSTOM6001>gp in reserve)

The XP Bank allows you to <CUSTOM6100>permanently retire a character<CUSTOM6102> and transfer their experience to other characters on your account.  When you retire a character, <CUSTOM6101>only 85% of their XP is stored<CUSTOM6102> in the family XP reserve, all gold is moved to your family gold account, and <CUSTOM6100>any items remaining on the character are destroyed<CUSTOM6102>.  <CUSTOM6101>Store anything you wish to keep in your family strongbox before retiring.<CUSTOM6102>  Both your family strongbox and family gold accounts must be open to use this service.  Other characters sharing your account key can then withdraw XP from the reserve here.

Are you absolutely certain?  <CUSTOM6100>This cannot be undone.<CUSTOM6102>  <CUSTOM6100>Any items still on this character will be destroyed permanently<CUSTOM6102> -- <CUSTOM6101>make sure you have moved everything you wish to keep into your family strongbox<CUSTOM6102>.  Your gold will be transferred to your family gold account, and <CUSTOM6101>85%% of your XP will be saved in the family reserve<CUSTOM6102>.  <CUSTOM6100>This character will be retired and you will be disconnected from the server.<CUSTOM6102>
How much XP would you like to withdraw?  (<CUSTOM6002>xp in reserve)
I'm sorry, but I'm unable to withdraw any Experience for you — your character is already at the Level 60 experience cap (17,498,600 XP). Is there anything else I can help you with?
I'd like to make a withdrawl.
I'd like to make a deposit.
Could you tell me some things about the bank?
I'd like to use my bank account now.
What happens when I "open my bank-vault"?
What happens when I "make a withdrawl"?
What happens when I "make a deposit"?
My bank vault seems rather small.  Is there any way to buy additional Strongboxes?
Could you tell me some things about the bank?
That's all I need for now.
What happens when I "open my bank-vault"?
What happens when I "make a withdrawl"?
What happens when I "make a deposit"?
How do I get a bank account?
I am done with my family vault.
I'd like to deposit gold in the family account.
I'd like to withdraw gold from the family account.
Tell me about the XP Bank.
I want to retire this character and bank my XP.
Yes.  I am certain.  Retire this character and bank my XP.
No, not yet.  I need to prepare first.
I would like to withdraw XP from the family reserve.
